summary: Full ExecutePage testing across all 5 states (blocked, ready, running, complete, failed). All 11 acceptance criteria verified and passing. Navigation and CompileRenderPage regression also pass. MOCK_EXECUTE restored to blocked state.
seed_data_creation: None - all mock data via MOCK_EXECUTE in App.js
passed_tests: BLOCKED: Stage heading 'Execute' + 'Intake Needs Review' badge (formatted)
BLOCKED: State card eyebrow 'CURRENT BLOCKER', title 'Execution is blocked' (amber), Return to Compile/Render button
BLOCKED: Pipeline shows 'Brief approved' with Blocked badge + helper text; other steps muted dashed circles
BLOCKED: Inspector Active step = 'Brief approved', Blocking reason = 'Waiting on brief approval'
READY: State card eyebrow 'READY TO DISPATCH', title 'Ready to dispatch' (cyan), Dispatch Executor button
READY: Metadata grid shows executor adapter, model, branch, repo
READY: Inspector Active step = 'Executor dispatched'; Started/Completed = 'Not dispatched'
RUNNING: State card eyebrow 'EXECUTION RUNNING', title 'Execution running' (blue), no CTA button
RUNNING: Inspector Active step = 'Execution running'; Completed at = 'In progress...'
COMPLETE: State card eyebrow 'EXECUTION COMPLETE', Proceed to Audit button
COMPLETE: All 4 earlier pipeline steps muted success, Audit ready shows Ready badge
COMPLETE: Activity log shows 2 entries, Artifacts list shows 2 items
COMPLETE: Inspector Active step = 'Audit ready', Result artifact path shown, Blocking reason = 'None', Audit state = 'Ready for audit' (cyan)
COMPLETE: Artifacts tab shows artifact paths; Logs tab shows log entries
FAILED: State card eyebrow 'EXECUTION FAILED', title 'Execution failed' (red), message from blockingReason, Review Executor Brief button
FAILED: Pipeline Execution running shows Failed badge (red XCircle)
FAILED: Activity log shows error entry in red
FAILED: Inspector Blocking reason shows error message in red, Active step = 'Execution running'
TABS: All 4 inspector tabs (DETAILS, ARTIFACTS, VALIDATION, LOGS) visible and clickable; active tab has cyan border
NAVIGATION: Compile/Render tab navigates to /; Execute tab navigates to /execute
NAVIGATION: Return to Compile/Render button in blocked state navigates to /
REGRESSION: CompileRenderPage at / still renders correctly with all elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: ExecutePage fully tested across all states. All acceptance criteria pass. MOCK_EXECUTE in App.js is set to blocked state (default). No bugs found.
